rules.rationale: The maintained Cursor plugin manifest carries the current canonical repository metadata while the immutable migration oracle retains its reviewed historical manifest bytes.

These exact paths belong only to the read-only generated target tree: aliases, host builder output, migration-only support files, or old generated layout. Their planned removal is an expected deletion, not a portable behavior claim.
These exact Cursor payloads remove foreign-host vocabulary during native packaging. The changes are wording/internal identifiers only; no portable control flow, state key, or hook behavior changes.

The Cursor projection receives the reviewed host-independent instruction wording from common source; this exact target path set records content-only packaging parity without accepting arbitrary future changes.
These exact paths are the accepted projection, managed-worker runtime, and target-native agent contract introduced by the approved canonical source migration.
